phase1_regex_view.task_description:
Replace (.) dots in user sample name with underscores
Change the sanitize_user_id function to remove dots
https://github.com/EdinburghGenomics/EGCG-Core/blob/f54591f5420dc4b4f8241e080e594a5fd6c5f87a/egcg_core/clarity.py#L114

critical_error.explanation: The agent introduced a syntax error by using an invalid escape sequence for the dot character within a regular expression.
critical_error.impact_analysis: The agent introduced a syntax error by using an invalid escape sequence for the dot character within a regular expression.
critical_error.counterfactual_reasoning: If the agent had correctly used `r"[^a-zA-Z0-9_._-]+"` (raw string), it would have avoided the syntax error.
